name.ja: セネトの<ruby>啓<rt>けい</rt></ruby><ruby>示<rt>じ</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt>しゃ</rt></ruby>－ネフェルタリ

text.en: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send it to the GY; show up to 2 Normal Monster Cards from your hand, Deck, face-up field, and/or GY, then Set that many "Sennet" Spells from your Deck. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your GY; equip 1 Normal Monster from your GY to 1 Ritual Monster you control as an Equip Spell. You can only use each effect of "Sennet Prophet - Nefertari" once per turn.
